Title: Second Chance Bags
Body (HTML):
Help Homeboy transform lives by sending us your gently used or unworn fashion finds. We will use them in our on-the-job training in sorting, assessing, and remarketing for people who face barriers to employment.

  • Bag dimensions: 20" x 22"
  • Pre-paid shipping label included
  • Customer drop off at your nearest FedEx location
  • What to recycle: Clean clothing
  • What NOT to recycle: Heavily worn, damaged or stained clothing, swimwear, socks, undergarments, or shoes

 

Second Chance Bag comes with a 10% off code for your next purchase at any of our online stores:

shophomeboy.com

shop.homeboythreads.com

shop.homeboyrecycling.com
